reviews.review_description: following the yt channel, great to see in VR

developer_response.body: Sweet! Glad to see a subscriber here!

reviews.review_description: This app delivers a great experience when you're interested in the science behind space and time. I read a lot about the subject, but this app actually embodies some of the groundbreaking scientific discoveries and let you experience them. Amazingly well done
Really  cool app. Simplified relativity and space concepts with stunning graphics and videos. A must have app for the oculus go. The 3D VR effect is spectacular.
We can learn a lot, it's a great experience!
Space Time needs to get ported to quest! If "spheres" knew what the heck it was talking about, it would be exactly this.
An excellent presentation
Great app learnt a lot
This was absolutely amazing and blew away my expectations. The graphics are amazing and I can't wait for the rest of the experiences.

I gotta say I am very happy with this app.

Really looking forward to next experiences

developer_response.body: Thank you! Can't wait to release more.

reviews.review_description: The segments you're released are really good!  Looking forward to the next ones, the deformable mesh in the preview is very cool.
I’d like to see more of this. Perfect for this platform. Where was this when I was in school?
Very informative and educational a must-see
Talkes about Einstein theory and impressive 3d rendering.  and it is free
S8+ , it's magnificent!!
Please, subtitles or voices in Spanish.
Science told in an interesting understandable way, good narration, beautiful, got both information and a wonderful feeling! Really good!

Not everything done in VR needs to be mindless entertainment. Sure, I love my zombie shooters and all, but a revolutionary medium like virtual reality needs to be more. Apps and programs that educate and stimulate the mind provide the biggest benefits to humanity that media has to offer. Case in point is Space Time, a title that contains an equal modicum of visual splendor and invaluable information. Rarely have I seen a space educational program that was so rich with facts and pleasing to the senses. Even if you think you may know all of what Space Time has to offer, it just may surprise you. I learned a fair deal, all while enjoying stunning graphics in a supremely relaxing environment. I can’t recommend it enough.

I send the app to my phone's sd before start downloading the videos.I also went through the apps settings in the phone and I gave it permission to storage.
It still downloaded to my main disc consuming almost all of the remaining space(1 vid).
Then I moved the video manually along with it's folders to the mirror app in the sd.It doen't recognizes it.
Bottom line,I bought it and I cannot have it.

Bought my GO yesterday and this free app was one of the first I downloaded job done! I'm hooked this is jawdroppingly awesome if you want to convince your friends to buy a Go show them this they will be running to buy one more like this PLEASE
